text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, this is the race Nice Nature
declared she would defeat Tokai Teio in.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, I couldn't miss a chance to run with
the great Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, give me a break! You're not gonna butter me
up that easy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But don't forget, I'm going all out today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That means I'm not going easy on you either!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Good! Because I'm also gonna come at you with
everything I got!
